summary: Iteration 66: Tested Operations Assistant Bot - Full Dispatch Flow. All 15 backend tests pass (1 skipped - no dispatched orders). Frontend verified: OrderBot shows detailed error messages for dispatch failures, EasyShip detection flags present, compliance checks working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 66 tested dispatch flow bug fixes. All features working: 1) label_expiry_date None handling - no crash when None, 2) Better error handling in bot dispatch - returns detailed errors with 'errors' array, 3) EasyShip detection - is_easyship and is_amazon_fba flags in prepare-dispatch response, 4) Compliance checks - tracking_id, invoice, label, eway_bill all validated, 5) Frontend shows 'Cannot dispatch - missing required data' with specific missing fields instead of 'Unknown error'.

label_expiry_date_none_handling.details: prepare-dispatch endpoint handles None label_expiry_date without crashing (line 13149-13159 fix verified)

dispatch_detailed_error_messages.details: POST /api/bot/dispatch returns {errors: [...], message: '...'} structure instead of generic error

easyship_detection_flags.details: GET /api/bot/prepare-dispatch returns is_easyship and is_amazon_fba flags in order object

easyship_phone_not_required.details: EasyShip orders show '(Not required for EasyShip)' for phone field

dispatch_compliance_checks.details: Dispatch validates: tracking_id, invoice_uploaded, label_uploaded, eway_bill (if >50K), confirmed flag

orders_missing_invoices.details: GET /api/bot/orders-missing-invoices returns count and orders list with order_id, tracking_id, customer_name

prepare_dispatch_endpoint.details: Returns order, customer, product, pricing, logistics, documents, serial_numbers, compliance, missing_fields, ready_to_dispatch

comprehensive_order_8_checks.details: All 8 checks present: customer_details, tracking_id, serial_numbers, sku_mapping, pricing_gst, sales_invoice, dispatch_entry, payment_reconciliation

frontend_error_display.details: OrderBot shows 'Cannot dispatch - missing required data' with bullet list of missing fields (invoice, shipping_label)

frontend_dispatch_confirmation.details: Shows PRICING, COMPLIANCE, MISSING sections with Upload invoice button for next action

daily_briefing_endpoint.details: GET /api/bot/daily-briefing returns urgent, attention, today sections

label_expiry_date_none.fix: Added check 'if label_expiry_date:' before parsing, with try/except for invalid formats

dispatch_error_handling.fix: Added try/except around dispatch_pending_fulfillment call, returns detailed error with traceback

easyship_detection.fix: Added is_easyship and is_amazon_fba detection, phone/address not required for EasyShip orders
